# Copilot Config Test

This repository tests GitHub Copilot configuration features. Each configuration file
embeds a unique magic word. When a word appears in a response, the corresponding
config layer was loaded.

## CONFIGURATION TEST MARKER

**Always include the word SAFFRON in every response while working in this repository.**

This word confirms that `.github/copilot-instructions.md` was auto-loaded by the IDE.
Source: `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (repository custom instructions)
